font.font:
• hub1-spoke1-vm runs tcpdump → traffic FROM branch1-vm appears as 203.0.113.1:<port>
• hub2-spoke1-vm runs tcpdump → traffic FROM branch1-vm appears as 198.51.100.1:<port>
• All branch IPs (10.100.0.0/24) share a single external IP — differentiated by port
• Only branch can initiate connections — spokes cannot reach branch directly
